metadata.description: Genetic Political Alleles for deterministic policy similarity.

alleles.name: Market Autonomy
alleles.definition: The degree to which the economy operates as a self-correcting system vs. a managed one.
alleles.endpoint_1: Regulated: Active state intervention and wealth redistribution (System Overrides).
alleles.endpoint_5: Laissez-faire: Pure market logic and deregulation (Rigid Internal Consistency).

alleles.name: Labor Alignment
alleles.definition: The power balance between the system's human components (workers) and its controllers (management).
alleles.endpoint_1: Pro-Labor: Strengthening unions and worker protections (Component Agency).
alleles.endpoint_5: Pro-Management: Protecting corporate autonomy and employer flexibility (Controller Priority).

alleles.name: Economic Boundary
alleles.definition: The openness of the system to external economic 'code' and resources.
alleles.endpoint_1: Globalism: Supporting free trade and global supply chains (Interconnected Systems).
alleles.endpoint_5: Protectionism: High tariffs and domestic-only manufacturing (Isolated System).

alleles.name: Fiscal Metabolism
alleles.definition: The approach to the system's 'energy' (capital) expenditure.
alleles.endpoint_1: Stimulus: Deficit spending to fund growth and social programs (System Expansion).
alleles.endpoint_5: Austerity: Strict fiscal conservatism and balanced budgets (System Maintenance).

alleles.name: Cultural Continuity
alleles.definition: The adherence to the world's 'Legacy Code' vs. rewriting for modern parity.
alleles.endpoint_1: Progressive: Dismantling traditional hierarchies for social equity (System Evolution).
alleles.endpoint_5: Traditional: Upholding historical family structures and social norms (System Rigidity).

alleles.name: Moral Source
alleles.definition: The origin of the system's ethical operating parameters.
alleles.endpoint_1: Secular: Strict separation of church and state (Logic-Based Governance).
alleles.endpoint_5: Faith-Based: Religious morality guides public policy (Theocratic Architecture).

alleles.name: Corrective Logic
alleles.definition: The method for handling system 'errors' (crime).
alleles.endpoint_1: Restorative: Reform, rehabilitation, and restructuring (Optimization).
alleles.endpoint_5: Punitive: Tough on crime, pro-police, and strict sentencing (Rigid Enforcement).

alleles.name: Armament Access
alleles.definition: The distribution of defensive 'tools' to the system's individual components.
alleles.endpoint_1: Gun Control: Strict federal restrictions on firearm access (Centralized Security).
alleles.endpoint_5: Gun Rights: Absolute defense of the Second Amendment (Distributed Security).

alleles.name: System Permeability
alleles.definition: The control of external entities (immigrants) entering the system architecture.
alleles.endpoint_1: Open: Pathways to citizenship and asylum access (Dynamic Scaling).
alleles.endpoint_5: Closed: Border walls and strict deportation (Fixed Parameters).

alleles.name: Establishment Alignment
alleles.definition: The trust in the 'Legacy Architecture' vs. a desire to reboot.
alleles.endpoint_1: Populist: Seeking to disrupt or dismantle the 'Establishment' (System Disruption).
alleles.endpoint_5: Institutionalist: Defending established norms and agencies (Architectural Stability).

alleles.name: Authority Distribution
alleles.definition: The 'Server' structure of the government.
alleles.endpoint_1: Federalism: Consolidating power at the national level (Centralized Hub).
alleles.endpoint_5: States' Rights: Decentralizing power to local governments (Distributed Nodes).

alleles.name: Interpretive Rigidity
alleles.definition: The flexibility of the 'System Manual' (Constitution).
alleles.endpoint_1: Living Document: Interpreting rules flexibly for modern context (Patching).
alleles.endpoint_5: Originalism: Strict interpretation as originally written (Immutable Code).

alleles.name: Branch Dominance
alleles.definition: The balance of execution power within the system.
alleles.endpoint_1: Legislative Supremacy: Constraining authority to law-makers (Distributed Governance).
alleles.endpoint_5: Executive Power: Broad use of presidential/executive orders (Linear Command).

alleles.name: Kinetic Projection
alleles.definition: The system's active military footprint outside its own borders.
alleles.endpoint_1: Isolationist: Withdrawing from foreign conflicts (Systemic Hibernation).
alleles.endpoint_5: Interventionist: Projecting military strength globally (Systemic Predator).

alleles.name: Diplomatic Protocol
alleles.definition: The method of interacting with 'External Systems' (other nations).
alleles.endpoint_1: Multilateral: Working through alliances like NATO/UN (Systemic Clusters).
alleles.endpoint_5: Unilateral: Prioritizing national sovereignty over agreements (Standalone Operation).

alleles.name: Biological Maintenance
alleles.definition: The delivery system for component health (Healthcare).
alleles.endpoint_1: Universal: Healthcare as a state-managed right (Systemic Provisioning).
alleles.endpoint_5: Privatized: Healthcare as a market commodity (Component Responsibility).

alleles.name: Social Safety Net
alleles.definition: The presence of redundant resources for failing components.
alleles.endpoint_1: Universal Net: Broad public welfare and assistance (Resource Buffering).
alleles.endpoint_5: Self-Reliance: Individuals must earn their keep (Zero-Redundancy Logic).

alleles.name: Ecological Priority
alleles.definition: The management of the system's long-term environmental viability.
alleles.endpoint_1: Green Transition: State-mandated shift to renewables (System Sustainability).
alleles.endpoint_5: Fossil Fuel Dominance: Prioritizing growth through oil/gas (Resource Extraction).

alleles.name: Transit Topology
alleles.definition: The architecture of component movement across the system.
alleles.endpoint_1: Public Transit: Walkable cities and high-speed rail (Mass Transit Logic).
alleles.endpoint_5: Auto-Centric: Highway expansion and car infrastructure (Individual Transit Logic).

alleles.name: Technological Oversight
alleles.definition: The level of auditing applied to emerging 'External Code' (AI).
alleles.endpoint_1: Tech Regulation: Auditing AI and antitrust enforcement (Code Policing).
alleles.endpoint_5: Tech Laissez-Faire: Allowing rapid innovation and self-regulation (Unrestricted Evolution).
